name: @memoryrelay/plugin-memoryrelay-ai
description: OpenClaw memory plugin for MemoryRelay API - sessions, decisions, patterns, projects & semantic search

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
⚠️  CONFIGURATION REQUIRED

Add config after installation:

cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | jq '.plugins.entries."plugin-memoryrelay-ai".config = {"apiKey": "YOUR_KEY", "agentId": "YOUR_AGENT"}' > /tmp/config.json && mv /tmp/config.json ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json

Or use environment variables:
export MEMORYRELAY_API_KEY="mem_prod_..."
export MEMORYRELAY_AGENT_ID="your-agent"

Then restart: openclaw gateway restart

Get your API key from: https://memoryrelay.ai
')"

author: MemoryRelay
